design_philosophy.core_loop: Horizontal scrolling with weapon selection and power-up collection across six stages; player chooses between two Blaster Fighter ships and equips one of seven distinct weapons to destroy enemies and a mechanical fortress
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Enemy avoidance and positioning combined with weapon optimization; managing resource collection (power-ups, bonus points) while navigating hazards
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Piloting an advanced fighter ship with customizable weaponry to defend Earth from a mysterious orbital mechanical fortress threat
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Strong emphasis on weapon variety and player choice over mechanical difficulty; deliberately tuned as an accessible shmup with straightforward progression rather than punishing arcade challenge

difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: High: weapon selection system allows players to tailor approach (Options, homing, missiles, rear shots, six-way spread) to their preferred playstyle; Border item provides collision forgiveness

progression.upgrade_system: Seven equippable weapons with distinct firing patterns and abilities (Striker with Options, Reverse diagonal shots, Six Way Shot, Homing Shot, Red Rockets, Green Homing Missiles); Power-Up items that increase standard shot power; Border item for collision protection
progression.unlock_mechanism: Weapon and item drops appear during stage progression; no apparent gating
replayability_hooks: Two selectable playable ships with distinct characteristics
Seven different weapon configurations enabling varied tactical approaches
Arcade mode popularity suggests score-chasing for competitive replay

world_building_techniques: Threat premise: mysterious mechanical fortress orbiting Earth with plans to take control of the planet
Visual stage progression suggests escalating conflict toward final confrontation

danger_signals: Orbital weapon platform with planetary conquest objective
Mysterious origin of mechanical fortress signals unknown external threat
environmental_storytelling: Mechanical fortress visual design communicates advanced technological threat
Horizontal progression through stages suggests escalating approach to confrontation
